project_type: Python cognitive agent prototype with concept formation, evaluation, and identity governance
build_system: setuptools with pyproject.toml, no external deps beyond pytest for dev
test_framework: pytest with tests/ directory, class-based and function-based tests
verification_instructions: Run pytest, confirm 297+ tests pass, confirm new tests pass
snapshot_or_generated_files: virtual_genesis/eval/results/ contains JSON result files but they are not checked in as fixtures
setup_instructions: pip install -e . from project root; python 3.12 at ~/.pyenv/versions/3.12.13/bin/python
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode - can call OpenRouter API. Pure Python stdlib only (urllib, sqlite3). No external deps.
contribution_requirements: Arabic documentation with Legitimate Theft methodology. Thefts numbered from 5.65 onwards. Use Arabic template for each theft.
key_patterns: TaskCase objects have required_properties and forbidden_shortcuts for contract verification. InMemoryMemoryStore/ConceptRegistry/TheoryRegistry are the stores to persist. LLMAdapter already exists with OpenRouter skeleton. Perturbation operators in eval/perturbations/taskcase_variants.py follow clone_case+modify+tag pattern. Verification in runtime/verification_runtime/service.py uses property_checks and shortcut_checks against contracts.
directory_structure: virtual_genesis/ (main package): api/ (config, session, llm_adapter, app), core/objects/ (data classes), eval/ (perturbations, runners, reports, task_sets, results), runtime/ (concept_engine, memory_os, theory_runtime, identity_runtime, verification_runtime, pipeline, etc). tests/ at project root.
